title: Ultima (ULTIMA) Holds Strong at $3,080 Despite Minor Dip - Market Cap Rank #259 Analysis
excerpt: Ultima cryptocurrency maintains its position above $3,000 with a current price of $3,080.38, experiencing only a modest 0.58% decline in the past 24 hours. The altcoin continues to demonstrate resilience in the current market cycle while holding its #259 ranking by market capitalization.
